title: On-the-fly NPC statting (NPC Statistics Table)
source: mythic-gm npc_statistics + Ars Magica creature format
method: Decide the expected value for the trait, ask a Fate Question, then scale:
human_units: Characteristics (−3..+3), Size, relevant Abilities, Soak (Sta + armour), Fatigue/Wound bands by Size.
creature_units: Add a Might (Realm) score — it equals the creature's Magic Resistance and fuels level-less powers from a Might Pool. Might 20 challenges a fresh magus, 40 a mid-age one, 75 ≈ near-immune to Hermetic magic.
